title: Auli Snowline & Chopta Serenity Trail
description: A premium Garhwal circuit blending Dehradun’s easy arrival, Auli’s alpine panoramas and Chopta’s peaceful Himalayan meadows. Designed for travellers who want mountain scenery, clean stays, private transfers and a well-paced experience without rushing the route.
hotelType: Boutique hill stays with scenic views
inclusions: 🚘 Private transfers and sightseeing as per plan
🥾 Guided local walk / easy trekking assistance in Chopta
exclusions: 🎫 Entry tickets, chairlift or activity charges
🌦️ Any expense due to weather or road closure
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival in Dehradun, assisted pickup and relaxed evening check-in.
Day 2: Scenic drive to Auli with photo halts and mountain-view stay.
Day 3: Auli sightseeing, cable car zone / meadow exploration and leisure time.
Day 4: Drive to Chopta via panoramic Garhwal stretches and sunset viewpoints.
Day 5: Morning nature walk / optional Tungnath-Chandrashila side exploration and free evening.
Day 6: Return towards Dehradun for onward departure.

title: Kumaon Lakes, Orchards & Wild Trails
description: A carefully balanced Kumaon holiday covering lake views, cantonment calm, orchard country and jungle-edge leisure. This route is perfect for families and couples seeking fresh weather, heritage ambience and a polished mountain-to-forest progression.
inclusions: 🏨 5 nights stay in selected premium hotels
exclusions: 🎫 Safari permit, monument and boating tickets
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival at Nainital, lake walk and check-in.
Day 2: Nainital local sightseeing with viewpoints, lake zone and mall road time.
Day 3: Proceed to Ranikhet, visit orchard / golf side stretches and continue leisure.
Day 4: Explore Almora’s ridge-town charm, temples and market pockets.
Day 5: Drive to Jim Corbett, relax at resort and optional evening nature experience.
Day 6: Departure after breakfast with onward drop assistance.

title: Ganga Gateway & Queen of Hills Circuit
description: A devotional yet comfortable itinerary that brings together Haridwar’s spiritual energy, Mussoorie’s colonial hill charm, Rishikesh’s riverfront aura and Dehradun’s smooth connectivity. Ideal for travellers who want darshan, mountain leisure and premium route handling in one journey.
hotelType: Comfort stays across spiritual and hill destinations
inclusions: 🛕 Har Ki Pauri / Ganga Aarti assistance
🧭 Trip coordination from arrival to departure
exclusions: 💸 Personal shopping, puja and donation amounts
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival in Haridwar, evening Ganga Aarti and check-in.
Day 2: Temple visits and drive to Mussoorie for overnight stay.
Day 3: Mussoorie local sightseeing including viewpoints and leisure market walk.
Day 4: Travel to Rishikesh via Dehradun with evening riverfront time.
Day 5: Rishikesh sightseeing, café / ghat circuit and optional spiritual experiences.
Day 6: Departure from Dehradun after breakfast.

title: Cedar Heights of Garhwal
description: A slower and more exclusive mountain circuit covering quiet forest stays, high viewpoints and crisp Himalayan weather. Perfect for travellers who prefer cedar woods, boutique hill properties and less-crowded Himalayan destinations.
transport: Private cab with relaxed intercity pacing
inclusions: 🥾 Easy nature walk / village trail support
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival and transfer to Kanatal, relaxed evening with valley views.
Day 2: Kanatal local exploration, camp side leisure and forest edge walk.
Day 3: Drive to Dhanaulti with eco-park stop and scenic check-in.
Day 4: Dhanaulti sightseeing and free time for slow mountain relaxation.
Day 5: Continue to Chakrata via beautiful hill roads and hidden viewpoints.
Day 6: Chakrata exploration including waterfalls / cliff side viewpoints.
Day 7: Return journey for onward departure.

description: A sweeping Uttarakhand holiday for travellers who want one large-format circuit combining spiritual gateways, hill stations, lakes, heritage valleys and wildlife-edge comfort. The route is paced to feel complete yet polished, with fewer logistical headaches for longer-stay guests.

transport: Private vehicle for the full 10-day circuit
